# Native Command Cheatsheet

## Core Validation

- `npm run typecheck`
- `elit test --run --file ./testing/unit/native.test.ts`

## When Desktop Rust Changes

- `cargo check --lib`
- `cargo test --lib`

## Wider Validation

- `npm run test:run`
- `npm run build`

## Useful Reading Before Editing

- `docs/native-css-support.md`
- `docs/native-element-support.md`
- `examples/universal-app-example/`
